mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_fire_report WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY next_submit ASC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_fire_report WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_fire_report WHERE deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_fire_report (report_type, law_basis, deadline_text, target_org, last_submit, next_submit, status, note, deleted, created_at, modified_at) VALUES ( #{reportType}, #{lawBasis}, #{deadlineText}, #{targetOrg}, #{lastSubmit,jdbcType=DATE}, #{nextSubmit,jdbcType=DATE}, #{status}, #{note}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_fire_report SET report_type = #{reportType}, law_basis = #{lawBasis}, deadline_text = #{deadlineText}, target_org = #{targetOrg}, last_submit = #{lastSubmit,jdbcType=DATE}, next_submit = #{nextSubmit,jdbcType=DATE}, status = #{status}, note = #{note}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_fire_report SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
